promotionDelta: Generate and verify package, registry, documentation, and public subpath outputs.
Pass packed consumers and package/source parity.

Verify view/edit transitions, native input and textarea editing, visible actions, complete keyboard map, IME suppression, touch targets, and deterministic focus restoration in every supported browser engine.
Verify synchronous validation, rejected async saves, retry, pending double-submit protection, reset/unmount cancellation, controlled external-change protection, and retained drafts.
Verify saved-value form serialization, native reset, disabled omission, read-only success, and owning-form responsibility guidance.
Record LTR, RTL, narrow, zoom, text-spacing, coarse-pointer, reduced-motion, enhanced-contrast, and forced-colors review.
Complete current risk-class manual assistive-technology evidence and publish an approved immutable Quality Passport.
